summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new AppSidebar implementation with Tools and History tabs. All backend APIs working perfectly. Frontend AppSidebar functionality fully operational with successful navigation, calculator functionality, and history management.

Navigation to BOL Generator page from sidebar
